Section.name: UNCLASSIFIED
Section.Content: Prepared by: Johan Pauwels Date: 29/11/2023 Cegeka reference: PRD.0.L.188 DV1.1 CONFIDENTIAL Service Description PRD.0.L.188 Application Management for ‘Takensysteem’ Argenta Table of contents 1 Service Description 4 1.1 Service identification 4 1.2 Service summary 4 1.2.1 Application Management Services 4 1.2.2 The Application 4 1.3 Service features 5 1.3.1 Standard Service features 5 1.3.1.1 Application knowledge 5 1.3.1.2 Application Management 5 1.3.1.3 Housekeeping 6 1.3.1.4 Monitoring 7 1.3.1.5 Security and Compliance 7 1.3.1.6 Backup and Restore 7 1.3.1.7 Incident and problem management 7 1.3.1.8 Customers responsibility 8 1.3.2 Optional Service features 8 1.3.3 Requests 9 1.3.4 Out of scope 9 1.4 Service characteristics 10 1.4.1 Obligatory 10 1.4.2 Cegeka owned Licenses and/or subscriptions 10 1.4.3 Customer owned Licenses and/or subscriptions 10 1.4.4 Conditions 10 1.4.5 Service delivery location 10 1.4.6 Service Reporting 10 1.4.7 Data classification 11 1.4.8 Use of Subcontractor/Sub-outsourcer 11 1.4.9 Miscellaneous 11 1.4.10 RACI Matrix 12 1.5 Adherence to Cross-Functional Services 14 2 Service Level Management 15 2.1 Service Window 15 2.2 Service Level 15 3 Service Billing 16 3.1 Standard Service Billing 16 3.2 Optional Service Billing 16 3.3 Change Request Billing 16 4 Document control 17 5 Document approval 18

Section.name: Service identification
Section.Content: Service Application Management for ‘Takensysteem’ - Argenta Unique ID PRD.0.L.188 Service Model Application Management Service (AMS). This service is dependant of other layers (IaaS and/or PaaS) which are indicated in the ‘Obligatory’ chapter of this document and which have their own Service Description. The combination of the layers assures the customer of the ‘infrastructure up to the functional application’ management. These obligatorily services are called the ‘Platform’.

Section.name: Application Management Services
Section.Content: The Service provides the end-to-end management of the ‘Takensysteem’ application (The Application) from an functional applicative perspective. Together with the underlaying obligatory Platform services, Cegeka unburdens the customer with all functional and technical aspects from infrastructure up to the functional Application. The Standard Service features consist out of:

Section.name: The Application
Section.Content: The ‘Takensysteem’ is a customized .Net 'engine' for tasks that are guided through the Argenta organization according to predefined process flows. The system considers the authorizations of each user, determined by their rights, to let them perform a specific activity each time, within the framework of a task. The system gets tasks via the AMQ queues. The application provides the workflow logic for department ‘Lenen’ and ‘Personen’. The application (code) is developed and provided by Cegeka. Further functional development is done based on requests and specifications from Argenta. The application remains owned by Argenta. The application uses .Net and Angular as main Application framework.

Section.name: Standard Service features
Section.Content: Cegeka ensures skilled engineers with knowledge of the Application and the development of the Application. We deliver the following activities within the managed service: Recurrent maintenance activities (housekeeping) are needed to ensure the correct working of the Application. Automation is applied where possible. Proactive management Housekeeping includes following regular checks: Resolution actions are triggered when needed and followed to assure the SLA. Patching The service includes a maximum of 7 planned releases per year according to release plan and are part of the Service. Additional patching can be done on RFC basis. Patching of the underlying platform is part of the Service of that platform. Life Cycle Management Cegeka monitors the Technology version of the service and notifies the Customer in accordance with the agreed LCM policy (see cross-functional Services) when used versions are subject to end-of-support or end-of-life. Appropriate actions (updates, replacement or other actions) are planned in accordance with agreed maintenance windows and will be executed on T&M basis in case of major updates. Patches and minor updates are included in the service cost as part of ‘Patching’. Cegeka monitors the correct working of the Application on all Customer environments. Monitoring improvements will be done during the lifecycle of the Service and are based on evaluation of incidents, problem management or other suggestions. The underlaying platform is also monitored according to the related Service Description of the platform. Monitoring events are evaluated during the Service Window in accordance to the Service Level of the individual environment. Notable events are treated as Incident tickets and are handled according to regular incident management. Management of technical users The management of technical users (for engineers) is done by Cegeka in agreement with the Customer and in accordance to the Customer IAM policies. Detection of security incidents The security management is performed following the Cegeka internal security policies and the contractual Customer security policies. Security incidents are created in case a security breach is detected and is immediately communicated to the Customer and Cegeka stakeholders. SIEM Additional monitoring can be done based on System and/or Application logs, which can be forwarded to a Customer SIEM solution (Security reason) or other solution (compliance reason, e.g. central collection of application logs to oversee the application stack) on request. Underlaying Platform hardening The underlaying platform and OS will be hardened as part of and according to the Service Description of the related Services. The operational Backup Plan contains the information on frequency and retention of the backups in accordance to the Customer backup policy. Restores can be done both on file and on full system level. These can be requested via the regular RFC process. Duration of a restore is dependant of the request (file or full; size of the item(s) to be restored). Application settings are subject to the backup of the underlaying platform. Besides monitoring incidents (see ‘Monitoring’) also other incidents can be reported by both the Customer and Cegeka. These will be subject to the regular incident management process (See Cross-functionals). Related to incident management, Cegeka performs also problem management (See Cross-functionals). The customer is responsible for the installation of the software during the release, based in the provided binaries and manual.

Section.name: Optional Service features
Section.Content: This section describes the features that can be optionally added to the standard Service features and that will be priced (when applicable) on top of the standard Service features. The following optional features are possible with the Service:

Section.name: Requests
Section.Content: Both the Customer and Cegeka can issue a Request for Change (RFC) or a Request for Information (RFI). There are multiple types of requests: The handling of Requests is subject to the regular change management process (see Cross-functionals). request type Description Lead time Service Requests (no specific Service Requests for this Service) Normal Changes Any other request. Examples: Developing additional features in the application. Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request.

Section.name: Out of scope
Section.Content: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service description is by default out of scope of this Service. Specifically:

Section.name: Obligatory
Section.Content: The following services are mandatory for the delivery of this service:

Section.name: Cegeka owned Licenses and/or subscriptions
Section.Content: The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Cross-Functional Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. License description/remarks (no Cegeka owned licenses) -

Section.name: Customer owned Licenses and/or subscriptions
Section.Content: The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are not included in this Service. It is the customers responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. License description/remarks (no Customer owned licenses) -

Section.name: Conditions
Section.Content: n/a

Section.name: Service delivery location
Section.Content: This Service is delivered remotely from the Cegeka (virtual) Office environment.

Section.name: Service Reporting
Section.Content: The Cross-functional reporting is part of this Service Reporting where it is applicable for this service (see section ‘Relation to Cross-Functional Services’). There are no specific (recurrent) reports for this Service.

Section.name: Data classification
Section.Content: Cegeka requires no access to confidential and/or personal data to perform this Service. Engineer credentials do not need to access such data for the purpose of this Service. In case of assistance in investigations of functional issues, Cegeka personnel may see or receive fragments of such data in case it is shared by the Customer (data fragments in the sense of exports, screen sharing, screen shots, etc. for investigation purposes).

Section.name: Use of Subcontractor/Sub-outsourcer
Section.Content: This service is delivered with: Subcontractor (Cegeka manages the Service with own engineers which are supported by an external party for escalations or technology specific questions or issues): (none) Sub-outsourcer (Cegeka delegates the Service to an external party): (none)

Section.name: Miscellaneous
Section.Content: n/a

Section.name: RACI Matrix
Section.Content: Activity Cegeka Customer Application Management Define functional changes C,I A,R Prioritizing product backlog (Argenta product owner) C,I A,R Working out details of a user story (analysis of the requirements) R A Software Development (and testing) of a user story A,R Testing a finalized user story (UAT) C,I A,R Project Management and steering group C,I A,R Minor version updates of the Framework A,R Investigate and correct unexpected results A,R C Technical Application Management Maintain technical Application knowledge A,R Installing Application software (deploying) C A,R Technical configuring the Application software A,R C Maintain technical Application documentation A,R C Identifying technical Application errors and problems A,R C Technical troubleshooting Application errors and incidents A,R C Technical performance tuning analysis A,R C System parameterization for technical performance (tuning) A,R C Creating and/or restoring backups A,R C Make changes to system configuration A,R C Housekeeping Follow up patches and upgrades of the application A,R C Evaluate and assess patch and upgrade effect on infrastructure A,R C Technical testing of the Application after deployment of patches and upgrades A,R C Functional testing after deploying patches and upgrades C A,R Monitoring and event management Monitor and report technical application errors and problems based on logs provided by the application A,R C Monitor capacity (CPU, memory, storage, network, ...) of the underlaying platform A,R C License Management Buy licenses n.a n.a Assign / Configure licenses n.a n.a Report on license usage on the Application n.a n.a RACI role definition:

Section.name: Adherence to Cross-Functional Services
Section.Content: The Service described in this Service Description adheres to the Cross-functional Services as described in the contract where this Service is residing unless documented in the table below: Cross-Functional Service Deviation from adherence to cross-functional services Anti-Malware management This service is not subject to Anti-Malware management. Anti-Malware management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. Vulnerability management & compliancy management (hardening) Vulnerability & compliancy management is done on the underlaying OS management layer. The Application and Application framework is subject to vulnerability checking by the use of the OWASP dependency checker. All Cross -Functional services rely on the Cegeka standard framework for processes and tooling.

Section.name: Service Window
Section.Content: The Service Window is the time frame during which the agreed support services from Cegeka are available. Service windows are defined in the related Service Level Management document to this contract.

Section.name: Service Level
Section.Content: Service Levels of the cross-functional services are defined in the related Service Level Management document to this contract. Availability The following Availability KPI’s are provided for the Service: KPI ID KPI name Availability Service Window Metric KPI.0.L.188.Bronze TAM Bronze Bronze % availability in Service Window The availability measurement is monthly and calculated as:

Section.name: Standard Service Billing
Section.Content: The service is billed on a monthly basis. ID Component Billing element BILLING UNIT SKU.0.L.188.L01 Application Management Takensysteem Application Management Takensysteem Per total installation SKU.0.L.188.L02 Monthly prestations Hours(T&M) Measurement The quantity of each billing element is determined on a monthly basis: Calculation / Billing The price(s) is/are determined in the pricing schedule where this Service is residing. The Service is billed per billing element:

Section.name: Optional Service Billing
Section.Content: n/a

Section.name: Change Request Billing
Section.Content: Changes are billed on a monthly basis. Changes as result of Pre-approved and Normal Service requests are billed according to the defined prices in the pricing document of the related contact. Non-standard change requests are billed on T&M basis.

Section.name: Document control
Section.Content: Document version Date Author Notes DV1.0 30/11/2023 Johan Pauwels First version aligned with structural Service Description requirements. DV1.1 25/10/2024 Johan Pauwels Comments removed, document cleanup for PDF.
